title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at RITES

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at RITES
jsonLd.description:
Join the RITES family as a Logistics Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!
